attributes.action: Student Loan Injustice: Demand Accountability for 22,000+ Misled Students!
attributes.additional_details: The parliament must demand accountability from all universities. When the institutions misclassified courses as "full-time," the students faced unexpected debt burdens. The government intervention should ensure universities bear responsibility for their errors, not the students. This protects students from financial hardship, maintains educational integrity, and fosters trust in higher education. It's about fairness and preventing exploitation.
attributes.background: Over 20,000 students are facing demands to repay a significant maintenance loan after being informed their course was deemed ineligible for financial support.  The government should ensure universities are accountable, preventing students from being unfairly burdened with loan repayments.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition:

Honour maintenance loans and childcare grants for existing weekend students
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762730
